chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜宇树科技发布载人机甲，投资人回应；京东：第一季度营收3157亿元，日本恩格尔系数创1980年以来最高水平同比增长4.9%
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

京东：第一季度营收3157亿元，同比增长4.9%

36氪获悉，京东发布2026年第一季度财报，第一季度营收3157亿元，同比增长4.9%；非美国通用会计准则下（Non-GAAP）归母净利润74亿元；京东零售经营利润率提升至5.6%，经营利润创历史新高。截至一季度，京东年度活跃用户数超7.4亿，季度活跃用户数实现连续10个季度的同比双位数增长。京东体系研发投入在一季度同比增长59%。

华硕第一季度营收2083.7亿元台币

华硕第一季度营收2083.7亿元台币，预估2001.3亿元台币；营业利润119.0亿元台币。（财联社）

宇树科技发布载人机甲，投资人回应

5月12日，宇树发布GD01载人变形机甲GD01，定价390万元起。宇树创始人王兴兴亲自登上机甲驾驶舱，并演示了一段真人操作。根据官方介绍，该产品为全球首款量产版载人机甲，可以变形，民用交通工具，体重约500

chinese_news.title: Walulu：用六个月撕开一条新赛道
chinese_news.summary:
文丨果脯

近日，成都雨之灵动科技有限公司（后称雨之灵动）宣布完成总额数千万人民币的天使轮及Pre-A轮融资。

目前其投资方阵容已颇为亮眼，包含KK集团、4399、科大讯飞和一家知名财务投资机构，涵盖了财务资本、渠道资源、游戏行业及AI技术四大维度。做到这种程度，基本已经覆盖了一家AI消费品公司的所需的核心拼图。

雨之灵动能同时吸引到这四类资方，一定程度上说明他们的项目不仅打动了财务投资人的直觉，也获得了产品方对其产品的市场期望。

雨之灵动的核心产品是AI仿生毛绒宠物Walulu。在公司创始人兼CEO顾小毛的愿景中，他们希望将Walulu打造成“AI时代的宝可梦”。

这并非雨之灵动最早的想法。2023年，他们决定ALL in AI时，首选的方向是自研垂类大模型。团队第一时间自购GPU并组建算法团队，持续交付了多个百万级的政府与B端项目。

同期，他们也开始探索2C路径，依托AI视频生成能力产出过多个爆款内容，单视频最高曾获得千万级曝光。后续他们还计划构建一站式IP生成平台，签约

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜新加坡博士团队创业获种子轮融资，首款产品做“会飞的家庭管家”
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，深圳熵约智能科技有限公司（下称“熵约科技”）日前完成数百万美元种子轮融资，本轮融资由初心资本独家投资。

熵约科技由新加坡南洋理工大学博士曾武，马来西亚理科大学博士况伟杰，清华智能产业研究院研究员万浩诚共同创立，核心团队成员来自清华大学、华中科技大学，南京航空航天大学，字节跳动，比亚迪等高校和企业，背景覆盖人工智能、理论物理与微型无人机系统。

目前，熵约科技的首款产品针对家庭空间设计，为全球首款家庭飞行机器人Flyer O1。

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨美国总统特朗普：非常期待中国之行  ；OPPO发布母亲节文案事件问责通告；快手计划分拆可灵AI，融资20亿美元
chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

天舟十号货运飞船与空间站组合体完成交会对接

国家广播电视总局：4月经备案国产电视动画片51部、9659分钟

任天堂股价因Switch 2游戏前景不佳大幅下跌

千问与淘宝打通，正式上线AI购物

TOP3大新闻

美国总统特朗普：非常期待中国之行

外交部发言人宣布：应国家主席习近平邀请，美利坚合众国总统唐纳德·特朗普将于5月13日至15日对中国进行国事访问。

当地时间5月11日，美国总统特朗普在其社交媒体“真实社交”发文表示，非常期待即将开启的中国之行，并称中国是“一个令人惊叹的国家”。(央视新闻)

OPPO就母亲节文案事件发布问责通告，高级副总裁职级直降两级

5月11日，界面新闻独家获悉，就OPPO因母亲节不当文案事件，OPPO5月11日内部正式发布问责通告，对相关责任人进行了定级处罚

chinese_news.title: 量子计算走出“科幻片”，「波色量子」在肿瘤、脑机等领域交出百余个落地案例
chinese_news.summary:
文｜胡香赟

编辑｜海若镜

在科幻电影《流浪地球2》中，拥有指数级运算能力的智能量子计算机“MOSS”，不仅能统筹起全世界的计算资源，支撑1万台“行星发动机”同步运转，还承载足“数字生命计划”那海量的、近乎无底洞般的计算需求，引��大众对量子计算机的无限遐想。这种曾经令人惊叹的科幻设定，如今已慢慢从实验室走向商业化落地。

按照“十五五规划纲要”，量子科技已被列入六大未来产业之一；市场层面的热度同样高涨：据IT桔子数据，到今年4月，国内量子计算赛道中的企业已超过90家，TOP 10企业的总估值逼近500亿元。其中，那些拥有海外顶尖学术背景和成熟产业经历的市场化团队，在这一轮资本竞逐中更受青睐，估值水平也相对高于同类企业。

成立于2020年的波色量子就是其中之一。波色量子并未依附于某家科研院所，但已拿到11轮融资，累计金额达18.4亿元。今年3月完成的10亿元B轮融资，直接创下国内量子计算领域单轮融资纪录。团队构成方面，创始人、CEO文凯博士毕业于斯坦福大学，师从量子计算领域权威学者山本喜久；COO马寅曾在航天行业

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜千问与淘宝打通，正式上线AI购物；泡泡玛特将在5月13日举行2026年一季度业务更新电话会
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

百济神州：第一季度净利润为16.08亿元，同比扭亏为盈

36氪获悉，百济神州发布2026年一季度业绩报告。报告显示，2026年第一季度实现营业收入105.44亿元，同比增长31.0%；归属于上市公司股东的净利润为16.08亿元，上年同期亏损，同比扭亏为盈。业绩变动主要系产品收入增长和费用管理推动了经营效率的提升。

营收确认规则是否存在调整可能？贵州茅台回应

5月11日，贵州茅台召开2025年度及2026年第一季度业绩说明会。会上，针对公司营业收入确认规则以及后续是否存在调整的可能的提问，贵州茅台财务总监、代董事会秘书余思明回应表示，公司严格按照财政部《企业会计准则第14号——收入》要求，在客户取得相关商品控制权时确认收入。其中，自营渠道（含i茅台）以客户确认收货为准，社会经销渠道以经销商签收货物为准。（每经网）

仙坛股份：4月鸡肉产品销售收入5.32亿元，环比增长15.9%</

chinese_news.title: 理想整车研发负责人刘立国：说理想不重视技术，是大大的误解
chinese_news.summary:
理想汽车整车电动研发高级副总裁 刘立国

文｜肖漫

编辑｜李勤

走过10年造车历程后，新势力阵营已经普遍从“轻盈”走向“厚重”。尤其是理想汽车，这家公司高呼成为“ 具身智能企业”，但也同时在垒高每一块整车技术能力。

尤其是过去4年，理想汽车几乎重构了底盘系统，联合供应商深度共创了底盘三大项：EMB刹车+800V主动悬架+线控转向。

理想在电池上也在进行自制布局，同时，在自身起家的增程技术上，理想也走到了自研自制阶段

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will US CPI remain above 3.5% through June 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: April 2026 CPI hit 3.8% (highest since May 2023) driven by Iran war energy shock; markets now pricing Fed hold or cut odds shifting daily.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC/BBC inflation reports; CoinDesk 'Bitcoin digests highest US CPI since 2023'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin remain above $80,000 on June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC holding $80k despite inflation print; bull-bear cycle indicator just turned green (first time since March 2023); retail call-buying at 10-day highs since 2021.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk live markets + bull-bear cycle; Cboe Mag 10 retail aggression data

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Trump-Iran ceasefire hold past May 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump called ceasefire 'unbelievably weak' and on 'massive life support'; month-long truce expires soon; every day without renewal risks oil spike and inflation reacceleration.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: BBC World + Trump comments; CNBC geopolitical risk linking war to inflation spiral

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Novo Nordisk (NVO) stock close above 200 on December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: High-dose Wegovy data showed 28% weight loss; momentum building for obesity market dominance; Hims plummet suggests supply concentration risk now priced in.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Novo Nordisk clinical data + Hims earnings collapse

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum hold above $3,000 through end of Q2 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Spot XRP ETFs just had biggest inflows since January (crypto capital rotating); inflation print pushes real yields higher, testing ETH on macro uncertainty.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk spot XRP ETF inflows; Bitcoin digestion of CPI data

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Strait of Hormuz remain partially or fully closed past June 15, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: US Energy Information Administration (EIA) official shipping reports; Reuters/Bloomberg Iran sanctions updates
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Market treating Iran ceasefire as binary (holds vs. breaks) but supply-chain damage (ink, petrochemicals) persists even if fighting stops; snack packaging switches signal long-tail inflation tail-risk.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC snack packaging story + CNBC 'other areas' inflation reaccel story; underestimating sticky commodity disruption risk

market_questions_to_create.question: Will JD.com (JD) stock close above 35 USD by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance / MSFT market data end-of-day close
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Q1 2026 earnings beat (4.9% YoY growth, 5.6% retail margin, record profit) barely moved needle; Alibaba's Qwen x Taobao AI shopping integration (Chinese media first) now live—JD needs to show AI monetization parity or loses tech narrative.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: 36Kr reported Qwen-Taobao AI shopping launch before English coverage; Chinese tech leadership in LLM commerce now visible; Western analysts still catching up

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Nvidia (NVDA) trade at or above $150 by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Huang excluded from Trump China trip signals trade friction escalation; retail call-buying at all-time highs on Mag 7 + AMD, Palantir, Broadcom is euphoria signal; geopolitical risk (Iran war, Trump negotiations) now suppressing China chip export upside.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC 'Jensen Huang not on Trump China trip' + Cboe retail call aggression = disconnect between euphoria and geopolitical deterioration

market_questions_to_create.question: Will BTC/ETH ratio exceed 25:1 by July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap BTC/ETH ratio feed
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Institutional collateral solutions (LMAX digital asset launch, Franklin Templeton/Kraken onchain products) favor BTC settlement; inflation shock + Iran premium = BTC narrative (inflation hedge) vs. ETH (growth beta). Spot XRP ETF inflows suggest capital prioritizing 'safe' settlement layer assets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk institutional infrastructure + crypto ETF flows divergence; BTC bull-bear cycle green vs. ETH's macro sensitivity

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US 10-year Treasury yield close above 4.5% on July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: US Department of Treasury official yield data or CNBC/Bloomberg closing quotes
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: April CPI at 3.8% = 70bps above 2% target; Iran war supply shock now structural (not transitory); Trump China negotiations risk stagflation repricing. Markets pricing one cut by June; sticky inflation could flip that to hikes.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC 'CPI reacceleration in multiple areas' + BBC Iran Strait closure = 2-3 month lag before real yields reflect supply shock duration

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY (US Dollar Index) into Q3 2026; geopolitical risk + sticky energy inflation + Treasury real yields = haven demand despite Fed cut pressure.
supporting_signals: April CPI 3.8% (highest since May 2023); energy component driven by Iran war
Trump Iran ceasefire called 'weak' and on 'life support'—escalation risk real
XRP/spot crypto ETF inflows suggest USD settlement layer re-rating (not crypto debasement)
Strait of Hormuz disruption affecting ink, petrochemicals = persistent supply shock language
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed's rate-cut bias (inflation fears from market) + soft landing narrative (JD, Novo earnings beats) could weaken USD if geopolitics stabilize and CPI rolls over by June.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (via DBC, UUP ETF, or DXY futures); short EURUSD via currency pairs; hedge with short gold/long real-yield bonds

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC vs. risk assets (tech mega-caps); inflation shock + Iran war = flight to settlement-layer narrative; Bitcoin's bull-bear cycle turned green for first time since March 2023—institutional collateral demand (LMAX, FT platforms) driving narrative shift away from growth.
supporting_signals: BTC bull-bear cycle indicator green (CoinDesk); BTC holding $80k on ugly CPI
Retail call-buying Mag 7 at 10-day highs = euphoria, but BTC steadier (Exodus selling into strength = smart money distribution)
New institutional onchain infrastructure (Franklin Templeton/Kraken, LMAX collateral) = rehypothecation demand for BTC, not leverage
Cboe Mag 10 (AI mega-cap focus) = flow chasing narrative; BTC = macro hedge against narrative fatigue
investment_theses.counter_view: If Iran ceasefire holds and CPI rolls over by June, risk-on rotates back to AI growth trades (NVDA, STRK); BTC loses inflation premium, pulls back to $70k.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perps (or spot + hedge with short NVDA call spread); Long BTC/ETH ratio (BTC outperforms growth token); Short SPY call spreads against long BTC

investment_theses.thesis: Rotate out of retail mega-cap euphoria (Mag 7) into AI infrastructure + biotech; Huang absent from Trump China trip signals NVDA geopolitical discount lasting through summer; Novo Nordisk obesity data + Hims collapse = biotech alpha via sector rotation, not single-name.
supporting_signals: Cboe retail call-buying at 10-year highs on AMD, Palantir, Broadcom = retail chasing losers, not leaders
CNBC: 'Jensen Huang not on Trump China trip'—explicit geopolitical risk signal for chip mega-cap
Novo Nordisk Wegovy high-dose 28% weight loss data = clinical inflection, not priced in; Hims -13% = supply concentration risk visible
JD.com +4.9% YoY, Alibaba x Qwen AI shopping live (36Kr exclusive) = China AI commerce leadership now executing, not speculating
investment_theses.counter_view: NVDA could re-rate on Taiwan peace signals or Trump pivot; Novo margins may compress if competition enters; Hims bounce on wholesale supply stability.
investment_theses.expression: Long SMH (semiconductor ETF) weighted to foundries (TSMC proxies, ASML) vs. short NVDA; Long biotech sector (XBI ETF) biased to GLP-1 pure-plays; Long China E-commerce (BABA call spread) on AI monetization catalysts

investment_theses.thesis: Short mega-cap growth narrative; Retail call-buying at 2021 levels + AI super-rally + inflation shock = classic euphoria-into-headwind setup. Real rates rising on sticky CPI + geopolitical premium = growth multiple compression into summer.
supporting_signals: Cboe data: heaviest 10-day retail call buying since 2021 COVID frenzy = regime-change signal (euphoria marker, not conviction)
US 10-year yields repricing higher on Iran war supply permanence + CPI 3.8% signal
Mag 7 + new cohort (AMD, Palantir, Broadcom) call-buying = retail chasing size, not alpha; smart money (Exodus selling BTC) rotating out
Trump China trip excludes Huang = explicit China supply-chain risk to AI chip revenue now telegraphed
investment_theses.counter_view: AI adoption acceleration (OpenAI, Anthropic, consumer LLM integration) drives Mag 7 higher; Fed cuts in summer = growth re-rates; ceasefire holds = geopolitical premium unwinds.
investment_theses.expression: Short QQQ call spreads (short 50-delta, long 60-delta); Long VIX call spreads (June/July); Short ARKK, TMF; Long TLT (long-duration Treasuries) as hedge into yield shock

investment_theses.thesis: China AI commerce narrative (Alibaba Qwen x Taobao, JD earnings beat, Kuaishou splitting Keling AI for $2B raise) outperforming Western hype on execution; rotational opportunity missed by English-language media—play JD, BABA call spreads into summer earnings.
supporting_signals: FLAG: 36Kr exclusive on Qwen-Taobao AI shopping launch (live now, not announced)—English media 1-2 weeks behind
JD.com Q1 2026 earnings: 4.9% YoY, 5.6% retail margin (record), 7.4B active users; AI monetization quietly underway
36Kr: Kuaishou splitting Keling AI, targeting $2B raise—Chinese players treating AI as standalone unit IPO narrative, not Nvidia call buyers
Contrast: CNBC obsesses on Mag 7 euphoria; Chinese media reporting commercial execution (Qwen purchasing, JD margin expansion, Kuaishou split)
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory crackdown (EU data/kids rules, China data gravity); macro slowdown in China (JD 4.9% growth modest vs. expectations); Yuan weakness pressures BABA valuation.
investment_theses.expression: Long JD call spreads (June 2026 expiry, 32-38 strike range); Long BABA call spreads (35-40 range); short NVDA against as hedge; track KWAI (Kuaishou) for spinoff arbitrage
